pr.title: [Non-Record] QAT Dead-Code Analysis + 7 Novel Technique Sweep (1xH100)

output.summary: Fixed torch.compile dead-code in Late QAT via tensor-scale STE and swept seven novel low-overhead ideas, showing each ms of overhead hurts on 1xH100.
techniques: Tensor-scale STE to flip Late QAT without recompiles
Muon-VS, SVD compression, recurrence, and widening tests to quantify per-ms overhead cost
Anti-layer diagnost ic sweeps plus prune-then-quantize toggles
